_comment: ES256 golden vector for the Hydropark offline license JWS (BACKLOG P1-16.8).
PURPOSE: let the lead independently prove the license signature is a REAL JWS ES256 signature
(fixed 64-byte R||S, IEEE P1363 / RFC 7518 3.4) and NOT accidentally left as ASN.1/DER.
The `token` below was minted by the production Es256Signer path over the fixed test key here;
backend's Es256GoldenVectorTest re-verifies it with the production LicenseVerifier AND via an
independent BigInteger->DER path on every build. The key is TEST-ONLY and reproducible.
Curve: P-256 = secp256r1 = prime256v1 = NIST P-256. Hash: SHA-256.
signature_encoding: raw R||S, 64 bytes, base64url (unpadded) as the JWS third segment — NOT DER
webcrypto_verification_recipe: const key = await crypto.subtle.importKey('spki', spki, {name:'ECDSA', namedCurve:'P-256'}, false, ['verify']);
const sig = b64u(s);  // must be exactly 64 bytes (R||S); WebCrypto ECDSA expects this, NOT DER
const ok = await crypto.subtle.verify({name:'ECDSA', hash:'SHA-256'}, key, sig, data);  // => true
